overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic industrial district. The player navigates sidewalks lined with massive pipes and chemical tanks, crosses sunlit intersections, and passes under elevated highways in a detailed cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead pipes and chemical storage tanks

events.description: orange vintage car passes by on the right side of the street
pedestrian crosses the sidewalk from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk, observing the street and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking away from camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with barbed wire running parallel to the sidewalk
massive cylindrical storage tanks visible behind the fence
large industrial pipes crossing overhead between buildings with orange accents
concrete industrial structures with exhaust pipes and metal walkways
vintage orange car parked on the street side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit industrial street lined with a tall metal fence on the left and concrete buildings on the right. Massive pipes cross overhead between structures. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing an orange parked car and encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with coffee shop and elevated highway ramps

events.description: exits the enclosed industrial pipe corridor into a wide open intersection
turns right at the intersection corner near the URBAN COFFEE building
waits for silver car to pass before continuing across the street

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection, turning right onto a new street while avoiding traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: low-rise beige building with URBAN COFFEE signage and graffiti
raised concrete highway structure with vehicles traveling on it
tall palm tree at the intersection corner
large electrical transmission towers with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide sunlit intersection. The camera turns right at the corner near the URBAN COFFEE building, navigating around a silver car passing through the intersection. An elevated highway ramp becomes visible on the left, and a tall palm tree marks the corner as the camera enters a new street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street beneath elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: walks under the shadow of the elevated highway overpass
enters deeper shadow as the overpass structure covers more of the sky
turns left at the corner near the blue industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing colorful billboards and turning left at the corner

notable_agents.action: person standing on the corner near a traffic signal pole

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the street
large colorful advertisements and anime-style graphics on building walls
building with distinctive blue paneling and metal fencing
tall street lamps with horizontal orange glowing bars

segments.scene_description: The camera walks beneath the massive concrete overpass structure, entering an area of mixed lighting with deep shadows. Digital billboards with colorful advertisements line the left side of the street. The camera continues forward before turning left at a corner marked by a blue industrial building and orange street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass beneath elevated highway with industrial buildings

events.description: enters the dark shadow of the concrete underpass
emerges from the underpass back into direct sunlight
turns right at the intersection near the parked truck

agents.ego_description: navigating through the shadowed underpass, emerging into light and turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead under the overpass in the distance

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of the highway bridge creating heavy shadows
large industrial truck parked on the street side
concrete wall covered with colorful street art and posters

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark underpass beneath the elevated highway, with the concrete structure blocking most of the sunlight. The area features graffiti-covered walls and a parked industrial truck. After emerging back into the light, the camera turns right at the intersection, continuing through the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit industrial district that gradually descends into the deep shadows of urban overpasses before returning to the light. It begins on a bright street lined with metal fences and concrete buildings, moving forward beneath massive overhead pipes and past pedestrians and a parked orange car. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, it turns right by an Urban Coffee building and a tall palm tree, navigating around a silver car as an elevated highway ramp comes into view. The scene then shifts into a zone of mixed lighting beneath the concrete overpass, where colorful digital billboards line the street before the camera turns left past a blue industrial building. Finally, the camera passes through a dark, graffiti-covered underpass beside a parked industrial truck before emerging back into the sunlight and turning right to continue through the district.
